pj=document.getElementById('pj'),sw=document.getElementById('sw'),glow=document.getElementById('glow'),page=1,loading=false,seen={},autoSpeed=.5,autoScroll=true,autoRAF;document.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){glow.style.left=e.clientX+'px';glow.style.top=e.clientY+'px'});pj.addEventListener('scroll',function(){if(pj.scrollLeft>10)sw.classList.add('scrolled');else sw.classList.remove('scrolled')});pj.addEventListener('pointerdown',function(){autoScroll=false;clearTimeout(pj._resume);pj._resume=setTimeout(function(){autoScroll=true},4000)});pj.addEventListener('wheel',function(){autoScroll=false;clearTimeout(pj._resume);pj._resume=setTimeout(function(){autoScroll=true},4000)},{passive:true});function tickAuto(){if(autoScroll&&pj.scrollWidth>pj.clientWidth){pj.scrollLeft+=autoSpeed;if(pj.scrollLeft>=pj.scrollWidth-pj.clientWidth-2){pj.scrollLeft=0}}requestAnimationFrame(tickAuto)}setTimeout(function(){tickAuto()},2000);var cards=document.querySelectorAll('.card');pj.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){var rect=pj.getBoundingClientRect();cards=pj.querySelectorAll('.card');cards.forEach(function(c){var cr=c.getBoundingClientRect();var cx=cr.left+cr.width/2;var cy=cr.top+cr.height/2;var dx=(e.clientX-cx)/cr.width;var dy=(e.clientY-cy)/cr.height;var dist=Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy);if(dist<1.5){c.style.transform='perspective(600px) rotateY('+dx*4+'deg) rotateX('+(-dy*4)+'deg) translateY(-2px)'}else{c.style.transform=''}})});pj.addEventListener('mouseleave',function(){pj.querySelectorAll('.card').forEach(function(c){c.style.transform=''})});var featured=[{name:"It's All Content loaded from JSON.',tags:['Canvas','1.4KB']}];function mkCard(r){var c=document.createElement('a');c.className='card';c.href=r.url;c.innerHTML='

'+r.name+'

'+(r.desc?'

'+r.desc+'

':'')+(r.tags?r.tags.map(function(t){return ''+t+''}).join(''):'');return c}function addCards(cards){cards.forEach(function(r,i){var c=mkCard(r);pj.insertBefore(c,sentinel);seen[r.name]=1;setTimeout(function(){c.classList.add('vis')},i*60)})}var sentinel=document.createElement('div');sentinel.style.cssText='flex:0 0 1px;height:1px';pj.appendChild(sentinel);addCards(featured);var obs=new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){if(entries[0].isIntersecting&&!loading){loading=true;fetch('https://api.github.com/users/robbiepryan/repos?per_page=30&sort=updated&page='+page).then(function(r){return r.json()}).then(function(repos){var newCards=repos.filter(function(r){return!r.fork&&!seen[r.name]}).map(function(r){return{name:r.name,url:r.html_url,desc:r.description||'',tags:[r.language].filter(Boolean)}});if(newCards.length){addCards(newCards);page++}loading=false}).catch(function(){loading=false})}},{root:pj,rootMargin:'0px 300px 0px 0px'});obs.observe(sentinel)
